assessment_objectives.objective: upon return from travel to authoritarian counties, the issued temporary, loaner or "travel-only" end user technology (e.g., laptops and mobile devices) is wiped / re-imaged before being re-issued.
organization-defined security requirements are applied to the system or system components when the individuals return from travel.
the following security requirements are applied to the system or system components when the individuals return from travel: <A.03.04.12.ODP[02]: security requirements>.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters: examine the system for signs of physical tampering and take the appropriate actions, and then either purge and reimage all storage media or destroy the system
